title: Trotsky y México. Dos revoluciones del siglo XX
original_title: Trotsky y México. Dos revoluciones del siglo XX
overview: "Trotsky and Mexico, two revolutions of the twentieth century" tells us of the famous Russian revolutionary asylum by President Lazaro Cardenas in Mexico.
